summary: Testing completed for MileageTrackingSection component extraction (refactoring from AdminDashboard.jsx). All 17 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all mileage tracking features work correctly: section expand/collapse, summary cards, manual entry creation, CSV/PDF exports, and all other admin sections remain functional.

details: Entering '4399' converts to admin email and logs in
Total Miles (This Year): 36.0 (updated after test entry)
Start Trip button present and enabled
Date field pre-filled with current date
Purpose dropdown shows: Thrifting, Post Office, Other
Save Entry button saves and shows success toast
Entry appears in Recent Trips list
Export CSV button visible and enabled
CSV contains correct headers: Date, Start Location, End Location, Miles, Business Purpose, Notes, Deduction Amount
Includes summary with Total Miles, IRS Rate, Total Deduction
Export PDF button visible and enabled
Each entry shows purpose badge (Thrifting, Post Office)
Shows date, From → To addresses, miles

passed_tests: Frontend: All admin sections visible on dashboard
Frontend: Summary cards display Total Miles, Total Trips, IRS Rate
Frontend: GPS Trip Tracking with Start Trip button
Frontend: Add Entry button opens modal with all fields
Frontend: Save Entry creates new mileage entry
Frontend: Export CSV triggers file download
Frontend: Export PDF triggers file download
Frontend: Recent Trips list shows entries with badges
context_for_next_testing_agent: MileageTrackingSection was successfully extracted from AdminDashboard.jsx as a standalone component (/app/frontend/src/components/admin/sections/MileageTrackingSection.jsx). No regressions detected. All mileage CRUD operations, GPS tracking UI, manual entry form, CSV/PDF exports work correctly. Other admin sections (Employees, Payroll, Time Entries, Forms, W-9 Review, Check Records) continue to function normally. AdminDashboard.jsx went from ~6787 lines to ~5880 lines after extraction.

refactoring_verification.import_verified: MileageTrackingSection is imported at line 56 of AdminDashboard.jsx
features_preserved: GPS trip tracking with Start Trip button
Manual mileage entry form with all fields
CSV export with IRS deduction calculations
Recent trips list with edit/delete actions
Summary cards (Total Miles, Total Trips, IRS Rate, Est. Deduction)
